column8: The storm made the divers stop while on their way back to Africa.
column9: Elias Stadiatis was the best diver on the boat.
column10: Sailors helped the sponge divers collect the treasures.
column11: Some of the divers were injured while diving.
column12: One of the discoveries from the shipwreck was ignored for many years.
column13: The mechanism changed ideas about the history of clockwork machines.
column14: Scientists  have stopped studying the Antikythera mechanism.
column15: No one has explored the shipwreck site for about a century.
